name: semantic-memory
description: Local-first persistent semantic memory for Claude Code: low-latency per-prompt auto-recall (warm HTTP server — no cold-spawn), project-scoped session priming, pre-compaction capture, codebase ingestion, a memory-keeper subagent, and skills to capture/curate/explore/sync — over the semantic-memory-mcp server (48 sm_* tools: hybrid + RL-routed search with persisted policy, bitemporal as-of search, graph/topology/community, content-based contradiction detection, claim verification, supersede/consolidate, autonomous lifecycle, real integrity checks, audit/replay receipts, and import-envelope support).
